headline: A Look At Match Group (MTCH) Valuation As COO Role Is Cut And User Trends Weaken
summary: Match Group (MTCH) is back in focus after the company decided to eliminate its Chief Operating Officer role, prompting longtime executive Hesam Hosseini to depart, just as pressure builds around user trends and competitive product updates. See our latest analysis for Match Group. At a share price of US$30.79, Match Group has seen short term share price weakness with a 90 day share price return of 7.23% and a 5 year total shareholder return decline of 79.24%. headline: Morgan Stanley ‘most constructive’ on Match Group shares in years
summary: Morgan Stanley came away from Tinder’s first-ever product event the “most constructive” the firm has been Match Group (MTCH) shares in multiple years. Match is seeing “faster product innovation and budding green shoots,” the analyst tells investors in a research note. Morgan Stanley says Tinder is “finally starting to evolve the product.” Sparks coverage and user growth are showing continued improvement, contends the firm.
